div1.entryFree: Engirt, to surround, encompass, enclose: so white a friend --s so white a foe, Ven. 364. that gold must round e. these brows, H6B V, 1, 99. Partic. engirt: this siege that hath e. his marriage, Lucr. 221. grossly e. with daring infamy, 1173 (enclosed as by a besieging enemy). my body round e. with misery, H6B III, 1, 200 (cf. Embrace H6B III, 1, 200).
